title: Vežba 49

questions.text:
Sofija piše sažetak koji je Brian tražio:

Security Breach Summary

Last week, a phishing attack targeted several team members. I spoke with Jake, our cybersecurity specialist, about what happened.

The team responded quickly after the breach was detected, isolating the affected systems in minutes, and limiting the damage.

Jake mentioned, however, that there was some confusion about team roles during the incident. He recommended clearer roles in our incident response plan.

Ideas to prevent future attacks:

  • Updating security training to cover more on phishing detection

  • Doing security audits more often

  • Keeping software updated, since the attack used an outdated system component

Zašto su zaključili da je program potrebno ispravljati svaki put, prema sažetku?

answers.answer: Zato što su potrebna ažuriranja i pravila kompanije.
answers.feedback: Sažetak nije spomenuo zakone kompanije kao razlog.
To nije razlog koji je dat za ažuriranje programa.

answers.answer: Zato što su stari programi teži za korišćenje.
answers.feedback: Nema objašnjenja o problemima korišćenja starih aplikacija.

answers.answer: Zato što je proboj koristio ranjivost u starom sistemu.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation: Poslednja ideja pomenuta u sažetku koristi since da objasni razlog uspešnosti napada. Pronađite šta je to i moći ćete da odgovorite na ovo pitanje sa preciznošću.
